reviews.comment:
Excelente atención y servicios, pude como socio renovar tanto el DNI como gestionar la licencia de conducir. El personal es muy amable y tratan de resolver todos los posibles inconvenientes que uno tenga. Gracias a todos ellos.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention. As a member, I was able to renew both my ID and apply for a driver's license. The staff is very friendly and tries to resolve any issues you may have. Thank you to all of them.
